_note: User tapped a postback action button in a template or flex message, or tapped a rich menu item. 'postback.data' is the developer-defined string set when building the button (max 300 chars). 'postback.params' is only present for datetimepicker actions — it contains the selected date/time values. Has a replyToken. Distinct from a 'message' event: no text is sent to the conversation unless the button has a 'displayText' set (which appears as a user chat bubble).
